error_excerpt: CALL_IN_EXECUTE_IMMEDIATE while calling migration proc wrapper
root_cause: Nested CALL executed inside EXECUTE IMMEDIATE is disallowed.
recommended_fix: Call procedures directly; do not wrap CALL in EXECUTE IMMEDIATE.
